hero.title: PEDALS
hero.tagline:
Handcrafted in Korea.
Rooted in American & British Sound.

brandStory.title: Why We Build Pedals
brandStory.paragraph1: The sound that echoed through American and British studios in the 70s and 80s — the distortion of tube amps pushed to their limits, the thick, raw walls of sound from vintage fuzz pedals. Those tones still captivate guitarists decades later.
brandStory.paragraph2: PEDALS recreates that sound, one pedal at a time, from our workshop in Korea. Each pedal is not just an effects unit — it's an instrument that responds to the player's emotion. Point-to-point hand wiring creates signal paths with a depth that machine assembly simply cannot achieve.
brandStory.paragraph3: We judge every component by its sound. We prioritize real tone over spec sheet numbers, and quality over cost. This is how PEDALS builds pedals.

steps.title: Component Selection
steps.description: Only the finest components sourced globally. Each resistor, capacitor, and transistor is personally listened to and hand-selected.

steps.title: Hand Wiring
steps.description: Every pedal is point-to-point wired by hand. Precise signal paths crafted by human hands, not machines.

steps.title: Sound Testing
steps.description: Thoroughly tested through real amps and guitars. Tone, noise, dynamic range — if it doesn't pass by ear, it doesn't ship.

steps.title: Shipping
steps.description: Only pedals that pass every inspection receive a serial number and ship under the PEDALS name.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.name: Name
checkout.thankYou: Your order has been received. Payment integration is being prepared — we'll reach out via email. Thank you.
